_doc: Audit query returns the Job.Stop event matching the failing job key. The actor is a non-human service account — watchdog-svc@acme.com — that issued Kill via the REST API. clientInfo is absent (no browser session). eventDetails references a watchdog rule name 'HungJobReaper'.

auditEvents.eventSummary: Job 'LongRunningProcess' (b2c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789bbbbb) was stopped (strategy Kill) by service account watchdog-svc@acme.com via API (rule: HungJobReaper, threshold: 180s)
